{{Infobox technique
| name = Star's Edge
| introduced = cradle-03-blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Star's Edge]] is an [[Enforcer technique]] in the [[Path of the Stellar Spear]] that reinforces a weapon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c4">''Blackflame'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Star]]’s Edge is a technique used by [[Jai Long]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c19">''Blackflame'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Star's Edge]] technique sharpens a user's hand with bright white [[sword]]-and-light madra.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
